data.title: Investors urged to act by Jan. 23 over 143% free cash flow collapse in StubHub Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: STUB) per Hagens Berman.
data.description: Reed Kathrein, a partner at a law firm, is investigating claims of known trends being omitted in vendor payments. On December 24, 2025, Hagens Berman, a national shareholder rights law firm, issued a statement to investors in StubHub Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: STUB) urging them to be cautious ahead of January 23, 2026. The firm is specifically highlighting alleged discrepancies in payments made to vendors.

data.title: Celebrate Christmas in Austin with a PrayerSong to bring love and joy to your family and friends.
data.description: Spread love in your home this holiday season with a special PrayerSong dedicated to your family and friends. data.title: As year-end $6B options expiry nears, Ether price facing pressure with investors seeking downside protection.
data.description: As the year-end $6 billion options expiration date nears, data on Ethereum options indicates that investors are ramping up their efforts to protect against potential losses, suggesting a sense of caution among traders.

data.title: Trading gets riskier as prediction markets boom. Creating a "cowboy" account can protect your retirement amidst frothiness.
data.description: As trading activity intensifies, brokerages are now providing prediction markets to investors. These markets act as a safeguard for retirement savings by offering a distinct "cowboy" account. This account aims to protect investors from the heightened risk associated with volatile market behaviors. The trend of prediction markets is on the rise, reflecting a growing interest in managing risk and safeguarding investments within the trading landscape.

data.title: Condor closes $13.65M financing to drill 12 wells in Uzbekistan.
data.description: Condor Energies Inc. announced the completion of its brokered private placement of Convertible Debentures at $1,000 each, generating total proceeds of $13,650,000. The Offering, which included the partial exercise of the over-allotment option, marks a significant milestone for the Company.

data.title: Crypto in 2026 balances privacy, decentralized identity with selective disclosure and zero-knowledge proofs, amid state, corporate convergence.
data.description: Selective disclosure and zero-knowledge proofs are becoming popular as a privacy-centric alternative to surveillance systems, as cryptocurrency, governments, and large tech companies focus on digital identity. This trend highlights a shift towards protecting personal data, with an increasing number of people opting for these solutions to safeguard their privacy. This indicates a growing movement towards privacy-focused technologies, as individuals and organizations seek ways to enhance their online security and protect their identities in an increasingly digital world.

data.title: In 2025, 5 major crypto airdrops distributed billions in free tokens to users, highlighting the largest giveaways.
data.description: In 2025, cryptocurrency users received billions of dollars worth of "free money" through token airdrops. Some of the largest airdrops occurred during this time period.

data.title: Gold and silver hit record highs with gold jumping 2.3% to $4,440 per ounce, up 67% for the year. Silver rose 2.1% to nearly $70 per ounce, up 133% YTD. The Russell 2000 surged 1.6%, S&P 500 up 0.8% reaching 6,875, Nasdaq 100 added 0.5%.
data.description: The spotlight remains on precious metals as Christmas week begins, with gold and silver reaching new record highs. Major U.S. equity benchmarks are continuing their gains for a third consecutive session as they enter a traditionally strong period of the year. Gold saw a significant 2.3% jump, now priced at $4,440 per ounce, representing its largest daily surge in over a month. Year-to-date, gold has surged by 67%. Silver also made gains, rising by 2.1% and nearing the important $70 level. Silver has performed even better year-to-date, with a remarkable 133% increase. Shares of gold and silver miners followed suit, with the VanEck Gold Miners ETF climbing 3.6% and the Global X Silver Miners ETF rising by 5%. In midday trading in New York, the Russell 2000 index rose by 1.6%. The S&P 500 also increased by 0.8% to reach 6,875, just under 1% away from its record high. The Nasdaq 100, known for its tech-heavy components, added 0.5% as well.

data.title: 13 Binance accounts moved $144M post-2023 settlement, and $1.7B since 2021, despite attempts to halt suspicious activity.
data.description: Information has surfaced regarding 13 potentially suspicious Binance accounts that have conducted transactions totaling $144 million since the 2023 settlement, and an alarming $1.7 billion since 2021.

data.title: "Anna's Archive says it copied almost all of Spotify's 86 million songs, revealing insights into favorite music."
data.description: "Ann's Archive" recently announced that it obtained data from 86 million songs on Spotify, uncovering fascinating insights about listeners' music preferences.

data.title: Solo Brands, Inc. simplifies to one common stock class, ends tax receivable agreement for shareholder alignment and cash savings.
data.description: Strategic initiatives are being implemented to better align with the interests of shareholders, with anticipated significant cost savings in the near future. These actions involve realigning the company's operations and optimizing its resources to drive profitability for investors. The anticipated cash savings as a result of these moves are expected to reach substantial amounts, positively impacting the company's financial outlook.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges BioVie Inc. shareholders to act swiftly, investigating possible breaches by officers and directors. Contact them to discuss your rights. NY, Dec. 24, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: Investors are advised to get in touch with the company promptly as time might be running out to assert their rights. On December 24, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, is looking into potential breaches by specific officers and directors of BioVie Inc. (NASDAQ: BIVI). Shareholders are urged to act swiftly in this matter.

data.title: LoKation Real Estate awarded 2025 Inman AI Award for AI innovation in real estate operations and agent growth.
data.description: In Pompano Beach, Florida on December 24, 2025, LoKation Real Estate was announced as the recipient of the prestigious 2025 Inman AI Award. This award acknowledges the brokerage's outstanding use of artificial intelligence in enhancing real estate operations, fostering agent development, and facilitating strategic business choices.

data.title: Mondelēz Global LLC recalls 2 SKUs of CHIPS AHOY! Baked Bites Brookie in the US due to small corn starch clumps posing choking risk.
data.description: In East Hanover, N.J., on December 24, 2025, Mondelēz Global LLC issued a voluntary recall in the United States for CHIPS AHOY! Baked Bites Brookie. The recall was initiated due to an error in the mixing process that led to the presence of small corn starch clumps in the product. The recall was prompted by concerns that the small starch clumps could pose a choking hazard, especially for vulnerable populations like young children and the elderly.

data.title: Top co-op games of 2025 for group fun: Donkey Kong Bananza and Borderlands 4! Join in with friends and family now.
data.description: Searching for the top games of the year for enjoyable moments with friends and family? Our recommendations include Donkey Kong Bananza and Borderlands 4 for fantastic co-op experiences.

data.title: Palantir stocks outperform in 2025, beats earnings by 25% in Nov with EPS of 21 cents and $1.18 billion revenue - on Nice list for 2026.
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc (NASDAQ: PLTR) has had a remarkable year in 2025, outperforming expectations with strong earnings results consistently. As a result, the company is well-positioned for a positive outlook in 2026. The stock of Palantir Technologies is on an upward trajectory, showing signs of further growth. In November alone, the Denver-based AI and data analytics firm exceeded market forecasts by an impressive 25%, reporting earnings per share (EPS) of 21 cents compared to the anticipated 17 cents. Revenue for the period reached $1.18 billion, indicating a significant 62.8% surge from the previous year. Additionally, Palantir raised its guidance, indicating confidence in its future performance. This story and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.
